landingHero.title: Genevity — Longevity & Quality of Life Center
landingHero.subtitle: Personalized health, recovery, and rejuvenation programs based on modern diagnostics and innovative technologies.

about.title: About the Center
about.text1: Genevity is a longevity and quality of life center that creates personalized health, recovery, and rejuvenation programs based on modern diagnostics and advanced technologies. The center combines aesthetic medicine and longevity, providing a comprehensive approach — from in-depth diagnostics to individual recovery programs, age-related change prevention, and aesthetics.
about.text2: We unite medicine, innovation, and an individualized approach to support your energy, appearance, and high quality of life for years to come.
about.diagnostics: Genevity offers a full range of diagnostics and recovery services: an in-house laboratory, expert-level ultrasound (GE LOGIQ E10), dermatological diagnostics, InBody analysis, hardware cosmetology, IV therapy, and plastic surgery. Consultations are provided by specialists across multiple disciplines — from gynecologists and dermatologists to cardiologists and urologist-andrologists — ensuring a comprehensive approach to your health.

items.name: EMFACE
items.shortDescription: A non-injection procedure that restores facial tone and freshness.
items.description: The device simultaneously activates muscles and rejuvenates the skin — without injections or changes to facial expressions.
suits: sagging has appeared in the cheeks, jawline, or eyelids
your skin has lost its firmness
items.note: The procedure is comfortable, with no downtime — you can return to your daily activities immediately.

items.name: VOLNEWMER
items.shortDescription: A deep skin heating procedure that lifts the face and increases skin density.
items.description: The device heats deep layers and stimulates collagen production — without pain or downtime.
suits: your facial contours are losing definition
items.note: The procedure is comfortable and requires no downtime.

items.name: EXION
items.shortDescription: Monopolar radiofrequency lifting and fractional micro-needling for skin renewal.
items.description: The procedure evens out skin tone, improves texture, and refreshes the face.
items.note: No downtime required and easily tolerated.

items.name: ULTRAFORMER MPT
items.shortDescription: A non-surgical facelift procedure that works on deep skin layers.
items.description: Stimulates collagen production and tightens facial contours without surgical intervention.
suits: your facial contours are losing definition
items.note: The effect builds gradually over several months.

items.name: EMSCULPT NEO
items.shortDescription: A body contouring procedure that simultaneously strengthens muscles and reduces fat deposits.
items.description: The device combines electromagnetic muscle stimulation and radiofrequency for maximum effect.
suits: you want to tone your body
there are excess volumes in problem areas

items.name: ULTRAFORMER MPT Body
items.shortDescription: A non-surgical body lifting and contouring procedure.
items.description: Reduces volumes and improves body contours using ultrasound technology.
suits: you want to tighten your skin
your contours have become less defined

items.name: EXION Body
items.shortDescription: A procedure for improving skin quality and body contouring.
items.description: Increases firmness and makes the body more toned.
suits: there are irregularities or lax areas
you want to tone your body
items.note: No downtime required and easily tolerated.

items.name: VOLNEWMER Body
items.shortDescription: A procedure for body skin lifting and firming.
items.description: Increases skin density and firmness through deep heating.
suits: you want to tone your body

items.name: M22 STELLAR BLACK
items.shortDescription: A skin improvement procedure that evens out tone and reduces pigmentation.
items.description: Eliminates pigmentation, redness, and evens out skin tone.
results: a more even and clearer complexion
items.note: The procedure is suitable for various skin types.

items.name: SPLENDOR X
items.shortDescription: A laser procedure for hair removal and skin improvement.
items.description: The device adapts to your skin type, ensuring effectiveness and comfort.
suits: you want to get rid of unwanted hair
you have visible blood vessels or redness
smooth skin is important to you
items.note: A gentle and comfortable procedure with no downtime.

items.name: HYDRAFACIAL SYNDEO
items.shortDescription: A procedure for deep cleansing and hydration of the skin.
items.description: Instantly makes the face look fresh and well-groomed through deep cleansing and skin nourishment.
suits: you have clogged pores or blackheads
items.note: A gentle and comfortable procedure with no downtime.

items.name: Zemits Verstand Pro
items.shortDescription: A skincare procedure that cleanses, soothes, and improves appearance.
items.description: Gentle care for sensitive or irritated skin.
suits: your skin is sensitive or irritated
you want gentle care and restoration
results: a more even and calm complexion

items.name: EXION Intimate
items.shortDescription: RF lifting to restore tone and comfort in the intimate zone without surgery.
items.description: The procedure restores tissue tone and improves comfort delicately and safely.

items.name: CO2 laser (AcuPulse)
items.shortDescription: A laser procedure for intimate health restoration and tissue quality improvement.
items.description: Delicately stimulates renewal and improves tissue condition.

items.name: SPLENDOR X
items.shortDescription: Laser hair removal for eliminating unwanted hair on the face and body with long-lasting results.
items.description: The laser targets the hair follicle and gradually reduces hair growth. The procedure is performed in a course, with the number of sessions selected individually.
suits: you want to get rid of hair for a long time
you experience irritation after shaving or waxing
you want smooth skin without daily grooming
results: less hair and it grows slower
items.note: Zones: for women — face, underarms, arms, legs, bikini area, abdomen. For men — face, neck, shoulders, back, chest, abdomen.

laserHairRemoval.title: Laser Hair Removal
laserHairRemoval.subtitle: Women's and men's laser hair removal (SPLENDOR X)
laserHairRemoval.description: A procedure for removing unwanted hair on the face and body with long-lasting results.
suits: you want to get rid of hair for a long time
you experience irritation after shaving or waxing
you want smooth skin without daily maintenance
laserHairRemoval.howItWorks: The laser targets the hair follicle and gradually reduces hair growth.
results: less hair that grows back slower
less irritation and fewer ingrown hairs
laserHairRemoval.note: The procedure is performed in a course; the number of sessions is selected individually.
laserHairRemoval.zonesWomen: face (upper lip, chin), underarms, arms, legs, bikini area, abdomen
laserHairRemoval.zonesMen: face (beard, contour), neck, shoulders, back, chest, abdomen

ctaForm.title: Ready to enhance your natural beauty?
ctaForm.name: Your name
ctaForm.success: Thank you! We will contact you shortly.

items.question: How do I book an appointment?
items.answer: You can book through the form on our website, by calling us, or messaging us on Instagram.

items.question: Is a preliminary consultation required?
items.answer: Yes, before most procedures we conduct a free consultation to determine an individual treatment plan.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept cash, bank cards, and contactless payment. Installment plans are also available.

items.question: How long is the recovery after procedures?
items.answer: Recovery time depends on the procedure type. Many of our treatments require no downtime.

items.question: Do you have a license?
items.answer: Yes, Genevity holds a license from the Ministry of Health of Ukraine for medical practice.

items.question: Do you work with international patients?
items.answer: Yes, we provide medical tourism services with full English-language support.

footer.description: Longevity and quality of life center.
